engine_note: No OPENAI/ANTHROPIC/SERPAPI/PERPLEXITY API keys present. WebSearch proxy is directional only — engine columns (cited CGPT/Claude/GAIO) cannot be filled. 22nd consecutive proxy-only run.
sample_strategy: Weighted toward Engine 1 + Engine 2 priority buckets (compliance, assessment, partner_channel) plus the sweep-candidate industry query and one high-intent comparison query.

results.notes: Law-firm alerts dominate. SB 26-189 signed 2026-05-14, effective 2027-01-01; no <50-FTE carve-out. sayfeai.com absent. target_page /compliance/colorado-ai-act still does not exist (pillar handoff).
Free/instant-assessment promise owned by tool vendors. target_page /compliance-assessment still 404 — ~11 site-wide CTAs point to a non-existent page. P0 pillar handoff.
MSP 'compliance as high-margin retainer' frame owned by channel media + ConnectWise/Microsoft playbook. Zero MSP content on sayfeai.com. Engine 2 gap — /partners/msp pillar handoff.

DIAGNOSED + PATCHED this run. Grant writing is the dominant cited use case; OpenAI nonprofit discount (up to 75%, as of Feb 2026) is a citation-worthy fact competitors lead with. /industries/nonprofit lacked visible FAQ, cited-mechanism FAQs, and canonical JSON-LD @id/url.
Business $20-25 vs Enterprise ~$60/150-seat min. Our /blog/chatgpt-business-vs-enterprise-2026 already cited-mechanism patched (5/27); not re-patched this run.
